form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of six months. Finished off last preparation second last in a small field at Hawkesbury Cg&E Bm64 October 23 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Inoue with 56.5kg at $3.90. form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 2nd of 13 at Muswellbrook Cl2 on March 27 over 1000m, on a slow track; head behind Occult carrying 55kg at $7.50. The run before that crossed from a wide gate to lead but couldn't hold on when 2nd of 11 at Scone Bm58 on February 24 over 1000m, slow going 1.3 len behind Solar Blast carrying 60kg at $3.90. Not far away of late. In the mix again.

Expected to go very well again.
